hero_sub: A village founded with the Republic, growing with the land.
koy_title: Rooted in the soil, home in the heart.
at_quote: "The peasant is the master of the nation."
selam_title: Even if you're far away, you have a place here.
selam_intro: This corner is always open for our villagers scattered across cities and countries.
selam_placeholder: Leave a greeting to the village, share a memory...
